sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation found in sources

special_mechanics.name: Jet Mega Man (Rush Adaptor)
special_mechanics.description: Mega Man fuses with Rush into special jet form. Allows player to fly upward or hover for brief period. Prevents use of charge shots.

special_mechanics.name: Power Mega Man (Rush Adaptor)
special_mechanics.description: Mega Man fuses with Rush into power form. Utilizes powerful short-range punch attack for destroying large blocks.

special_mechanics.name: Mega Buster
special_mechanics.description: Primary weapon that can be charged for more powerful shots. Can be enhanced with Master Weapons from defeated Robot Masters.

special_mechanics.name: Slide
special_mechanics.description: Standard Mega Man movement ability, but disabled when using either Rush Adaptor form.

tier_notes: Tier 2 empirical/qualitative data. Available sources contain game information, level design details, and gameplay mechanics but no numerical physics values, ROM data, or precise movement parameters. Movement physics are documented qualitatively through gameplay descriptions rather than quantitative measurements.
